toast.new-record: Floor {{floor}}... deeper than ever. The stone will remember, for a while.
toast.no-skull-key: No key, no descent. The cavern does not open for the unproven.
toast.too-far: The old doors answer only when you stand before them.
toast.no-foothold: The shaft remembers no descent yet.
toast.memory-spent: The old marks remain, but the shaft has forgotten every path.
toast.repair-materials: The dead mechanism wants five iridium bars and a battery pack.
repair.question: A hollow socket waits beneath the rust. Set five iridium bars around a battery pack?
toast.repair-complete: Violet light takes the old rails. The shaft remembers how to move.
